message_text: I do want to clear this loan, but I cannot pay the full amount today.

I’m an AI agent for Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I understand you want to clear the Nira loan ending ****4831 but cannot pay the full amount today. I’ve noted that position and your existing contact boundary. I’ll complete assessment here and route this for the next team to review concrete approved options without repeating questions.

Thanks. Please note I can make a small payment now, and a larger one after my salary is credited, so I’d appreciate a realistic payment plan.

Given the current Nira policy, any payment arrangement must complete within 30 days. Based on what you already shared, one policy-compliant path to evaluate is 2000 now with the remaining balance cleared by 2026-04-20. If you want to proceed on that basis, I can record that request for approval. I cannot confirm approved reduced-closure terms from the available data in this turn.
That sounds workable if approved. I can pay 2000 now, and I should be able to clear the rest by 2026-04-20 after my salary is credited.

I’ve recorded your request on that basis: 2000 now and the remaining balance by 2026-04-20 for approval review on loan ****4831. Under current Nira policy, that timing is within the 30-day window. No arrangement is finalized unless approved terms are confirmed. Per your preference, you should only be contacted if a concrete approved option becomes available.
